name: Andrew Yang
subject: You made this happen, Yang Gang
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
At the beginning of the year, no one knew my name

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4294%2E377263%2EyTEiRG) Yang Gang --

At the beginning of the year, no one knew my name. Now, thanks to you, our campaign is surging and I’m seeing “Yang2020” everywhere -- including on a presidential tour bus!

**I can’t tell you how incredibly humbling that is, so I wanted to personally reach out and thank you for everything you’ve done to get us here.**

But we absolutely cannot slow down now. You know we must work twice as hard as other campaigns to get our message out. **We’ve set a new goal of raising $2 million by midnight on December 15th to completely fund our ground game in Iowa and the other early states -- and show everyone we’re not done growing yet.

[Contribute $10 or whatever is meaningful to you right now so we can blow yet another goal out of the water. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18924?t=5&akid=4294%2E377263%2EyTEiRG)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18924?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4294%2E377263%2EyTEiRG)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18924?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4294%2E377263%2EyTEiRG)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18924?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4294%2E377263%2EyTEiRG)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18924?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=4294%2E377263%2EyTEiRG)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18924?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4294%2E377263%2EyTEiRG)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18924?t=8&amount=25&akid=4294%2E377263%2EyTEiRG)
---
The establishment media may not understand our campaign -- but millions of Americans do.

We are building this Humanity First movement from the ground up -- with or without the attention of the talking heads, pundits, and political reporters.

**[Help me get in front of as many early state voters as possible by helping to fully fund our on-the-ground efforts.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18924?t=7&akid=4294%2E377263%2EyTEiRG)**

Thank you for everything you’re doing,

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18924?t=6&akid=4294%2E377263%2EyTEiRG)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=4294%2E377263%2EyTEiRG) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4294%2E377263%2EyTEiRG) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Health Care Update
subject: The Affordable Care Act is at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
| | **BREAKING: The Affordable Care Act is at risk of being overturned!**
---
**Should we protect the ACA?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MTY2ODI1MTUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDQyNTIxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTY2ODI1MTUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDQyNTIxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Republicans are still laser-focused on dismantling President Obama's signature health care law and slashing health care access for millions - including rolling back protections for people with preexisting conditions. **Since the GOP failed to repeal the Affordable Care Act in Congress, they 're now trying to overturn it in the courts.**
Donald Trump and Republican governors are supporting lawsuits against the ACA - and if Trump wins in 2020, he and Mitch McConnell will make overturning the ACA and cutting health care access one of their top priorities.
With the 2020 election quickly approaching, Americans are more divided than ever, and the health of millions is at stake. That's why we're reaching out to hear from grassroots Democrats like you.**Please tell us before midnight: **

subject: In the spirit of radical transparency

body:
We've been looking over our latest fundraising numbers here at Booker HQ. And in the spirit of radical transparency, we wanted to send over what we found.

subject: We can end Trump’s war on diplomacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress

Team, I wanted to make sure you saw this headline: | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tq-ZfQPms6GR0pPfuFj_3I6_LrjIBLAgJsjVggbkjcE=/PTFSdSa8e02VQaF8QMcDqypyibMoX0L8cAsnImtwkcs=?recurring=auto&refcode=20191207email)
---
**President Trump has repeatedly undercut Foreign Service Officers ' ability to implement America's foreign policy and protect our national security. **While previous administrations have had arguments over the policies themselves, "no president has been as nakedly hostile to America's diplomats as Donald Trump."
**True patriots respect the sacrifices of those who serve our country overseas.** "Career foreign service officers work long hours in difficult conditions, making less money than they would in the private sector. Often, they are driven by their sense of mission--say, promoting American values abroad."
But because of Trump's constant attacks, Foreign Service Officers are retiring at alarming rates, and we are losing our status as a world leader. European leaders laugh at America and "China just surpassed the United States in diplomatic muscle. The United States, which for decades after World War II had the highest number of embassies and consulates, has been outpaced by a rising adversary." **Quite simply, these attacks have become a threat to our national security.**
I was a proud US Foreign Service Officer for almost 15 years. But two years ago, I resigned from the Foreign Service to run for Congress, because I recognized that the greatest danger to our country was not a foreign power, but the hyper-partisan political games being played in Washington. Since then, it has become ever more clear to me that we need more public servants in Washington, and fewer self-serving politicians -- [**I know what it means to serve our nation, and when you send me to Washington I 'll fight to bring back respect for our Foreign Service and diplomats. Will you help me get there?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/tq-ZfQPms6GR0pPfuFj_3I6_LrjIBLAgJsjVggbkjcE=/PTFSdSa8e02VQaF8QMcDqypyibMoX0L8cAsnImtwkcs=?recurring=auto&refcode=20191207email)

**PREVIOUS MESSAGE:**
Friends,
This week, the House Judiciary Committee held its first hearing to discuss the constitutional threshold for impeachment and whether the President's behavior meets that standard. Of the four legal scholars called to testify in front of the Committee, not one was a person of color.
Many of the most accomplished, erudite, and forward-thinking scholars of our time are people of color. To challenge President Trump -- who has repeatedly incited violence against minority communities -- without the input or expertise of a single member of those communities is simply shameful.
I first called to impeach President Donald Trump over two years ago for his hateful and incitive remarks against people of color, Muslim-Americans, Jewish-Americans, the LGBTQ+ community, and other disadvantaged and underrepresented groups. Though I am proud and grateful that my colleagues in Congress have joined me in the call, it is not enough to indict the President without including these charges.
For Congress to ignore the President's stoking of white supremacy and choose only to hold him accountable for his actions regarding Ukraine is a clear sign to those communities that their pain is not enough to prompt action.
We are at a crossroads in our nation's history, and our actions will be remembered for years. It is our responsibility to use this moment to advance liberty and justice for **_ALL_**. I pray that the hands of history will record that when we were confronted with President Trump's abuse of power via racism, anti-Semitism, Islamophobia, xenophobia, and transphobia, we did the right thing and impeached him for it.
In solidarity,
Congressman Al Green

name: Charles Booker
subject: Reaching out: Will you share your priorities with me?
body:
|
---
Folks, This week at my team’s listening tour stop in Whitesburg, Kentucky, we had a group conversation. Neighbors talked about what made them proud to be a Kentuckian, and what kind of movement they wanted to see in our Commonwealth. Afterwards, a young man came up to me and said he didn’t feel comfortable talking in front of the whole crowd. But he was so inspired by the discussions in the room that he wanted to share his thoughts with me. I listened as he told me his concerns for the future, his ideas for solutions, and his hopes for our Commonwealth. He told me that politicians typically don't care what he thinks. That’s why I’m doing this tour in the first place. [_**Will you click here to take a moment to share your priorities with me?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12624304/130066623/929790540?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTJkMmE5NS0wZjE5LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bBzzcxkSju7slUv2Lky3_lNTUtz_ugfvt8L2NNS1xJk=&emci=702d2a95-0f19-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=712d2a95-0f19-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2635570) | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12624305/130066624/929790540?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTJkMmE5NS0wZjE5LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bBzzcxkSju7slUv2Lky3_lNTUtz_ugfvt8L2NNS1xJk=&emci=702d2a95-0f19-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=712d2a95-0f19-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2635570)
---
We’ve got to make sure everyone, no matter where they live in the Commonwealth or how much money they have in their pocket, has a way to share what’s on their mind.
For too long, Mitch McConnell has made decisions without Kentuckians in the room. He doesn’t know your story or your name. The only names he knows are the ones of the corporations that sign his checks. I’m leading a movement to replace him with a senator who puts you first.
[_**I want to make decisions with your concerns in mind. What issues matter to you? Click here to share your thoughts in a survey that I’ll look over with my team in the coming days.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12624306/130066625/929790540?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTJkMmE5NS0wZjE5LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bBzzcxkSju7slUv2Lky3_lNTUtz_ugfvt8L2NNS1xJk=&emci=702d2a95-0f19-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=712d2a95-0f19-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2635570)
We’re going to demand brighter days for Kentucky. That requires a movement. I promise you, folks: This is a movement that meets you where you are.
Talk to you soon,
Charles Booker
**[Donate Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12624307/130066626/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191207_m&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTJkMmE5NS0wZjE5LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bBzzcxkSju7slUv2Lky3_lNTUtz_ugfvt8L2NNS1xJk=)** **[Donate Once](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12624308/130066627/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191207_o&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTJkMmE5NS0wZjE5LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bBzzcxkSju7slUv2Lky3_lNTUtz_ugfvt8L2NNS1xJk=)** Contributions to CBEC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
---
While Mitch McConnell gets richer, our state gets poorer. As he gains power in Washington, our communities lose it in Kentucky. That’s why Charles Booker is seriously considering running for the U.S. Senate. But he wants to do this right. As he keeps traveling the state to have real conversations with real people, [_**will you donate to his exploratory committee?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12624309/130066628/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191207_footer&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTJkMmE5NS0wZjE5LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bBzzcxkSju7slUv2Lky3_lNTUtz_ugfvt8L2NNS1xJk=)

| | Peter, That's a tweet from President Trump's campaign manager about an incredible poll that was just released on our congressional district. Here are some of the key takeaways:
* 49% of voters want a Republican elected to the House. Just 42% want a Democrat.
* Only 37% of voters say Kendra Horn deserves re-election.
* Over half of this district's voters oppose impeachment.
* Almost 2/3rds of voters want Kendra Horn to move past impeachment and work on pressing issues.

That last point is critically important, because we know liberal Democrat Kendra Horn won't back off of impeachment. So-called "moderates" like her are the reason Nancy Pelosi was able to open this inquiry in the first place.

A Republican can and will win this district in 2020. But we need your help to make sure it's a conservative fighter ready to deliver the solutions Oklahomans need.

[**Will you donate $25, $50, $100 or even $250 to help us beat Kendra Horn and take back this district in 2020?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=2169153b5c&e=795c6d9796)

[**That's why we need your help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=59a80def3d&e=795c6d9796)

Hi Friend, Wow, it has been less than three months since we launched our campaign on the banks of the Willamette River together, and we've already changed the game of Oregon politics forever. Our campaign has focused on our vision for Oregon and the country -- a just transition to renewable energy, family supporting jobs in our rural communities, universal healthcare, accessible childcare, a housing plan, debt free education, and new pathways to citizenship for immigrants and asylum seekers. name: Team Stephanie
subject: How we beat Chris Smith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
Did you see Kim's email?
We have 39 days until the end of the year. Can you chip in $39 to my campaign right now?
|
---
friends -- In 2018, Democrats showed we could really challenge Chris Smith. We gave him his closest race in more than three decades! Now we have to finish the job and send Chris Smith packing. But we can only do it if we make another big splash with our end of year fundraising goal. _**[Can we count on you to make a contribution? We need 39 people reading this email to donate and stay on track with our goal.](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff091/522d4087/7afcb00f/4f341678/2027489263/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191207_em_topper")**_ \-- Team Stephanie | **[Donate](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff091/522d4087/7afcb00f/4f341678/2027489263/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191207_em_topper")**
---

\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
Date: Thursday, December 5
Re: How we win
From: Kim Maier

| | Friends, I want to introduce myself. My name's Kim and I came on board as Stephanie's Campaign Manager in November. **I'll get right to the point:[I'm going to ask you to make a grassroots donation to Stephanie's campaign.](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff091/522d4087/7afcb00f/4f341677/2027489263/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191207_em")** I'm no stranger to this district or Chris Smith. I was the Campaign Manager for this race in 2018. We had a strong Democratic candidate, raised good money, and gave Chris Smith a real fight -- his closest race since 1982. When Stephanie asked me to come back and finish the job, I couldn't say no. From Day 1, she has refused corporate PAC money. Our hard-working team has centered their work on serving and representing this district. Stephanie's out talking to voters and raising grassroots donations. **She's building a real grassroots supporter base.** **That 's how we'll win. That's how we'll finish the job we started in 2018.** [**So, if you 're like us, and you want to send Chris Smith packing after 39 years in office we need you to chip in right now.**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff091/522d4087/7afcb00f/4f341677/2027489263/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191207_em") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[Donate $10 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff091/522d4087/7afcb00f/4f341676/2027489263/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20191207_em_express_lane_10")**
---
**[Donate $25 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff091/522d4087/7afcb00f/4f341675/2027489263/VEsA/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20191207_em_express_lane_25")**
---
**[Donate $35 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff091/522d4087/7afcb00f/4f341674/2027489263/VEsB/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=20191207_em_express_lane_35")**
---
**[Other amount](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff091/522d4087/7afcb00f/4f341673/2027489263/VEsO/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191207_em_express_lane_other")**
---
Thank you,
Kim Maier
Campaign Manager
|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Lindsey Graham is a national embarrassment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter \-- Honestly, we're sick and tired of South Carolina Senator Lindsey Graham. He has done nothing these past few months but contort himself to defend Trump against the impeachment proceedings and help him push his hyper-partisan agenda. Graham has refused to read the transcripts of the House interviews, claiming they wouldn't change his mind anyways. He's tried to unmask the whistleblower, saying the entire impeachment inquiry is "invalid" without their testimony. He supported Trump's emergency declaration to build the wall on our southern border. And, at the bidding of the White House, he blocked a bill recognizing the Armenian genocide to not anger Turkish president Erdogan \-- hours after arguing with him over Turkey's invasion of Syria. Lindsey Graham is up for re-election, but we think he shouldn't stick around to cause any more damage, so we're asking voters what they think about Lindsey Graham. We need 119 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Should Lindsey Graham resign?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcb7/6e9863e8/16e1c4e7/1db0bba2/1312696934/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/q1R3eoK3") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcb7/6e9863e8/16e1c4e7/1db0bba2/1312696934/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/q1R3eoK3") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcb7/6e9863e8/16e1c4e7/1db0bba1/1312696934/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-jaime-nd?refcode=OUT20191207a.ND&refcode2=s03IG0ytDSdsChKdhWHo")

subject: What I mean when I say this is about you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
I plan to govern based on YOUR interests -- not special interests.
|
---

| | When I first shared the news that I'm running for Congress, I told you this campaign isn't about me. It's about you. Here's what I mean when I say that: I don't plan to govern based on the needs of corporations or special-interest groups. **I plan to govern based on the needs of everyday hardworking North Carolinians.** [_**So as we begin this campaign, it 's important that I hear from you directly. Will you take our Official Priorities Survey and tell me what issues are most important to you and your family?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3da/3d199a51/2f2cda18/7364e515/2612393641/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e191208") I've sat down with so many North Carolinians and heard about their experiences, their concerns, and their disappointments. I've heard about everything from health care and education to jobs and Social Security. These are _real issues_ that have a r _eal impact on real people_. I've heard the stories firsthand, and I've seen the effects in our community. North Carolina needs a leader who will listen to them. [_**I want to be that leader, and that 's why I can't properly begin this campaign without hearing from you. Take a moment to complete our Official Priorities Survey >>**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3da/3d199a51/2f2cda18/7364e515/2612393641/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e191208") I look forward to reading your responses -- they will help shape our campaign. subject: We can be better than this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:

|

[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489092a/7f51f7bc/4bb498fa/4ef0f661/3828162385/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **Have you had enough of Senator Cornyn's blatant partisanship?
↓
Are you ready for a senator who will put Texans over party politics?
↓
[Donate now to help elect MJ Hegar and defeat Senator Cornyn >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489092a/7f51f7bc/4bb498fa/4ef0f660/3828162385/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191207.1nd__594__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---
Hi Peter,

Mitch McConnell's Senate has done some pretty awful things in the past few years. **And Senator Cornyn has been with him every step of the way.**

For starters, they tried to **repeal the Affordable Care Act** over and over again, with no plan to replace it. Had they succeeded, millions of Texans with pre-existing conditions would be at risk of losing their health care at the whims of the insurance industry.
| ➥ | Senator Cornyn was right in line with his boss Mitch McConnell, voting to repeal the Affordable Care Act _18 times_ \-- even though Texas has the highest uninsured rate in the country! _Politico_ even dubbed Cornyn health care "repeal's top salesman."
---|---|---
| |
**[Had enough of Senator Cornyn carrying water for Mitch McConnell? Pitch in now to help defeat him>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489092a/7f51f7bc/4bb498fa/4ef0f660/3828162385/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191207.1nd__594__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
Then, McConnell **held DACA hostage** during a government shutdown, threatening the futures of thousands of Dreamers here in Texas and across the country.
| ➥ | And Senator Cornyn? He talked a big game about supporting Dreamers, but in the end he sold them out, choosing instead to stand with McConnell as he used Dreamers as a bargaining chip for an ineffective border wall.
---|---|---
To top it off, they've been busy **forcing unqualified, hyper-partisan judges through to lifetime appointments.**
| ➥ | Sen. Cornyn didn't just vote for judges like Brett Kavanaugh and many other partisan and extreme judicial nominees -- he even cheered Kavanaugh's confirmation with a champagne toast!
---|---|---
**It's time for a senator who will put Texas over partisan politics.[Pitch in to help elect MJ Hegar >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489092a/7f51f7bc/4bb498fa/4ef0f660/3828162385/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191207.1nd__594__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

\-- Team MJ

Friend,

Thursday was a great day in Indiana.

We were honored to host the President's Workforce Advisory Board meeting in Indianapolis and talk about all of the amazing progress that Indiana is making with Secretary of Commerce Wilbur Ross and Special Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump.

The Governor wanted us to pass along a few notes from the meeting so that you could get an inside look at the conversation he had with Secretary Ross and Special Advisor Trump...and learn about how Indiana is working to skill-up ALL Hoosiers to succeed in the 21st century.

**[If you have any questions about the President's Workforce Advisory Board or want to learn more about how Indiana is leading the way, follow this link and leave us a note!](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7670912ab2ea4694a494b77ce846fa8e&_e=JU8RPx0rqrjWO7SD1Pchel74XaFf_eDeOeDQ5DY6vYIWPDW67QllbfCyWLzllikXCvd5PnbZbS3jMQvDjtLK1SWJ8ON5sJbKaxcYjFTY7udzgNwOXEu8qh7QLUfPx3rQ91DklgsErgIBGywefPD9XtjTFL1gDg5V47xxZqSrwuyeFAWs5fxchhbiOokcOQ6toRhSR8UAdtclRGaxP6XVts7nlyHkNl6kiabx4ZChREMZuqFBdYoLIoxgX5s6Z4XaBaL6m0rgo2wr4quvBJbcoSSsaaEdy_t387DK0U9mLDA4odZC9T0UkCfunNrwTTXu8QxGGbKASR8IVs7dLNEu5vcBgj00gjsiSyz3GZNbyr5YEvD2gSZCYJINtp6MbsD7hS4Z7pVjmfKVPWsbZcn4ce8Y8jaW56fqTB0KLb0NNNc%3D)**

Best,
Holcomb Crew

**\--------- Forwarded Message ---------**
From: Gov. Holcomb
Subject: meeting notes
To: Holcomb Crew
|
---
Team,

It's been a great meeting so far in Indianapolis and I just wanted to catch you up on what I’ve been talking about with Secretary Ross and Special Advisor Ivanka Trump.

So far, we’ve covered:

The Last Mile Program
* This program gives offenders the opportunity to earn skills relevant to the high-wage, high-demand tech jobs available in our economy and is already making progress to reduce our recidivism rate.

Our Next Level Jobs initiative
* This initiative has enrolled more than 21,000 Hoosiers in free courses and more than 9,100 people have earned a high-demand credential while on the job. We’ve doubled funding for these grants and helped more Hoosiers learn and earn in the 21st century.

There’s still more to talk about, but I couldn’t be more grateful to have the opportunity to share Indiana’s success story with Secretary Ross and Special Advisor Trump.

Could you please share this with the Holcomb Crew to update them about our meeting?

Best,
-Eric

subject: I need 9 signers from Cresco
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
More than 20 million Americans gained health insurance when the Affordable Care Act was signed into law nearly a decade ago.
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daadb/5721a3ed/71acc16d/efaad81/1491130589/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friends,
More than 20 million Americans gained health insurance when the Affordable Care Act was signed into law nearly a decade ago. But for the first time since the law's passage, new government figures show that the number of uninsured Americans is on the rise.

In fact, compared to 2017, there were two million more Americans who lacked health insurance in 2018 - and while it's an outrage, it's not exactly shocking. Donald Trump is actively supporting a lawsuit that could end the ACA for good. The Trump administration has encouraged states to make it more difficult for people to prove they're eligible for Medicaid.

Millions of Americans and Michiganders benefit from the ACA - whether it's through the health insurance they get or by being protected from discrimination based on a preexisting condition. That's why I'm fighting any and all Republican attempts to weaken or dismantle the law.
I'm looking for 10,000 folks to sign on to make your voice heard: [**_Please sign this petition to demand Congress protect affordable health care. The number of insured in this country should be going up, not down. If you agree, sign your name now._** ](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/GP-healthcare-petition?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk155-ot-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FGP-healthcare-ja%3Fcode%3Djtk155-ot-nd")

In the decade that the ACA's been law, millions more Americans have been able to afford routine doctor's visits. The fact that we see that trend reversing under President Trump is deeply disturbing. It's immoral, even. We can't let that trend continue.
I was proud to vote for health care reform during my time in the House, and I'll fight with everything I have to defend the ACA in the Senate. But the buck doesn't stop with me. The GOP is attacking affordable health care from every angle - in the courts, in Congress and through the power of the presidency.

**[_That 's where you come in, friends. Please add your name now to demand Congress protect affordable health care._](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/GP-healthcare-petition?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk155-ot-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FGP-healthcare-ja%3Fcode%3Djtk155-ot-nd")**
Thanks,

Gary

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: LIVE POLL: Republicans are STILL trying to derail the impeachment inquiry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Republicans' arguments against impeachment keep coming up short, whether it's that there was no quid pro quo (multiple witnesses testified there was) or that what Trump did was not a crime (Constitutional scholars testified that he committed multiple impeachable offenses). It may have something to do with the fact that their entire GOP leadership is embroiled and connected to the Ukraine scandal and cover-up. Even Devin Nunes, the ranking GOP member on the House Intelligence Committee, tried to uncover the identity of the whistleblower without disclosing that he was involved in coordinating the quid pro quo in the first place (though we know the GOP doesn't really care about federal law if it gets in their way of pushing a false partisan agenda). On Wednesday, Republicans on the Judiciary Committee again tried to subpoena the whistleblower, but House Democrats blocked it. We're running a rapid response poll, and we need to hear what voters like you think of this new development NOW: **Do you approve of Republican tactics in the impeachment inquiry?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcb9/6e9863e8/16e31875/1db0bbaf/19933260/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/kGO04PmJ") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcb9/6e9863e8/16e31875/1db0bbaf/19933260/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/kGO04PmJ") Thank you in advance for your feedback \-- we couldn't do this work without you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcb9/6e9863e8/16e31875/1db0bbae/19933260/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191207b.ND&refcode2=D9vHF9cegqpqvfjs3sps")

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I need to be honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
We're in real danger of falling behind, and we only have a few weeks to change that before we close the books on this fundraising quarter.
I'll be blunt, team:

We're behind where we need to be right now when it comes to closing the fundraising gap.

Cory Gardner already had a big head start in the money race--and in the last few months, outside groups and a whole bunch of Mitch McConnell's powerful D.C. friends have been pouring money into Colorado to help him hold on to this Senate seat.

We're in real danger of falling behind, and we only have a few weeks to change that before we close the books on this fundraising quarter.

**I need to ask directly:** [**_Can you chip in today to help close the gap?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?refcode=em_fr_20191207_JH_20191207-fr-JH-short-2mo_2mo_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you so much. I am endlessly grateful for your support.

-- John
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?refcode=em_fr_20191207_JH_20191207-fr-JH-short-2mo_2mo_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: The 2020 election may hinge on universal healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, The healthcare industry is in full attack mode as single-payer health plans rise in popularity among Democrats. Lobbyists working on behalf of hospitals and insurance groups helped write and revise op-eds written by lawmakers critical of Medicare-for-All proposals being suggested by leading Democratic candidates. These groups have been spending millions on ads in an attempt to scare Americans away from affordable healthcare and keep them on expensive private insurance. Meanwhile, Donald Trump has proposed trillions of dollars in budget cuts to Medicaid and Medicare over the next 10 years, threatening the livelihoods of millions of Americans. Voters are split on the issue, and we need to hear from YOU so we can understand what engaged voters, not insurance companies, think of these ideas: **Do you support universal healthcare?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcbb/6e9863e8/171d5c89/1db0bbb7/3544942110/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Psogj4n0") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcbb/6e9863e8/171d5c89/1db0bbb7/3544942110/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Psogj4n0") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcbb/6e9863e8/171d5c89/1db0bbb6/3544942110/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191207c.ND&refcode2=0CLc4EgFXqHQ6Oce6laT")

Team --

I just got out of my weekly check-in with our finance team and I have some bad news to share with you:

**We are only a handful of days into December, and _not_ on pace to reach our most important FEC deadline of the year.**

I'm a little worried because our race is a top target for my opponent Jason Lewis, Mitch McConnell, and their billionaire buddies who will spend whatever it takes to defeat me.

If our campaign doesn't post the strongest numbers possible, then I'm afraid Republican mega-donors and right-wing groups will think Minnesota is ripe for the taking.

That's why it's so important we hit these goals every single week through the end of the year. To compete with that kind of GOP cash, we need a surge of grassroots contributions from folks like you. So, I'm asking:

**Can I count on you to donate toward our weekly goal of raising $20,000 before midnight on Sunday and helping us stay on track for our biggest FEC deadline yet?
